Name: Contrast
Definition: Exponentially weighted difference in EVI between adjacent pixels

Name: Correlation
Definition: Linear dependency of EVI on adjacent pixels

Name: Dissimilarity
Definition: Difference in EVI between adjacent pixels

Name: Homogeneity
Definition: Similarity of EVI between adjacent pixels

Name: Maximum
Definition: Dominance of EVI combinations between adjacent pixels

Name: Variance
Definition: Dispersion of EVI combinations between adjacent pixels
